title: Mode Transition Test Programme
description: Test programme for combined-cycle engine mode transition across the full Mach range including failure mode verification
notes: Covers air-breathing to rocket transition and back

title: Propulsion Transition Failure Mode Analysis
description: FMEA/FTA covering all failure modes during propulsion mode switching with safety mitigation evidence

title: Mode Switching Certification Compliance Document
description: Compliance document demonstrating mode switching safety against applicable certification basis

title: TPS Inspection Criteria and Procedure
description: Inspection criteria and procedure for TPS panel assessment after each hypersonic re-entry mission
notes: Inspect metallic/CMC panels for erosion, delamination, and thermal damage

title: TPS Re-flight Authorisation Process
description: Formal re-flight authorisation process defining pass/fail criteria and signoff authority for TPS re-use

title: TPS Reusability Test and Demonstration Report
description: Test and demonstration report evidencing TPS reusability across the required number of flight cycles

title: Abort Mode Analysis - Full Envelope
description: Analysis of abort modes and trajectories covering all mission phases from takeoff through orbit/apex to re-entry
notes: Subsonic / transonic / supersonic / hypersonic abort cases

title: Return-to-Landing Capability Verification
description: Flight simulation and test verification of return-to-landing capability from each abort scenario

title: Abort Coverage Compliance Statement
description: Formal compliance statement with evidence references demonstrating full-envelope abort coverage

title: Airworthiness Certification Basis Document
description: Document defining the applicable airworthiness certification basis for the subsonic/transonic flight phases
notes: EASA CS / FAA FAR applicable parts

title: Launch Licence Compliance Plan
description: Plan for compliance with space launch licensing requirements covering supersonic/hypersonic and orbital phases
notes: AST / national space authority applicable regulations

title: Dual Framework Regulatory Interface Agreement
description: Formal agreement between airworthiness and launch licensing authorities defining responsibilities and interface

title: Cryo Tank Fatigue Analysis
description: Structural fatigue analysis for LH2/LOX integral tanks under cryogenic thermal cycling and pressure load spectra
notes: Thermal fatigue from cryogenic fill and TPS coolant cycling

title: Cryo Tank Inspection and Turnaround Procedure
description: Inspection and turnaround procedure for cryogenic tanks defining minimum inspection intervals and allowable re-use life

title: Cryo Reuse Certification Evidence Package
description: Evidence package demonstrating airworthiness of cryo reuse cycle including fatigue data and inspection records
